tagline: Trusted Pool Care for Fairfield & Westchester Since 1992

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves Expert
Hands
hero.subheadline: For over 30 years, Putnam Swimming Pool Service has been the name Greenwich, Stamford, and Westchester families trust for reliable maintenance, skilled repairs, and stunning renovations. Our certified technicians treat every pool like their own.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Comprehensive Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From Opening to Closing
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly clean, an equipment overhaul, or a complete renovation, our experienced team handles every detail so you can simply enjoy the water.

cards.title: Weekly Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Thorough skimming, brushing, vacuuming, filter cleaning, and chemical balancing on a reliable weekly schedule. Your pool stays pristine and swim-ready all season long in the Connecticut climate.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Replacement
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and automation controls diagnosed and repaired by certified technicians. We source quality parts and stand behind every repair we make.

cards.title: Pool Renovation & Restoration
cards.description: Replastering, retiling, coping, liner replacement, and deck resurfacing that breathe new life into aging pools. We use premium materials engineered for Northeast weather extremes.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precision chemical testing and balancing to prevent algae, scaling, and corrosion. Crystal clear, safe water that is gentle on skin, eyes, and your pool surfaces.

cards.title: Sanitization System Upgrades
cards.description: Salt chlorine generators, UV systems, and ozone sanitizers installed and maintained. Modern solutions that reduce chemical handling while keeping your water flawless.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Winterization
cards.description: Professional spring opening and fall closing services that protect your investment through harsh Connecticut winters and guarantee a worry-free start every summer.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Ownership

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form below. We will visit your property, inspect your pool and equipment, and deliver an honest, transparent quote within 24 hours. Zero pressure, zero obligation.

steps.title: Our Certified Technicians Take Over
steps.description: Your assigned technician arrives on schedule every visit with the training and tools to handle cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and any unexpected issues on the spot.

steps.title: You Enjoy the Water, We Handle the Rest
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling from Memorial Day through Labor Day and beyond. If anything ever falls short of perfect, we make it right immediately at no extra charge.

about.label: Why Homeowners Choose Putnam
about.headline: Three Decades of Trusted, Certified Pool Care
about.description: Since 1992, Putnam Swimming Pool Service has built its reputation one pool at a time across Lower Fairfield County and Westchester County. We hold Connecticut Home Improvement, Plumbing, and Pool Builder licenses, plus Westchester Home Improvement credentials. Our team is trained through the National Swimming Pool Foundation and the Association of Pool & Spa Professionals. That depth of expertise means problems get solved right the first time.

features.title: Multi-Licensed & Fully Certified
features.description: CT Home Improvement, CT Plumbing, CT Pool Builder, and Westchester Home Improvement licenses. Plus NSPF and APSP certified technicians on every job.

features.title: Consistent, Reliable Scheduling
features.description: Same technician, same day, same thorough service every week. We show up when we say we will, and we never cut corners on your pool care.

features.title: If It Matters to You, It Matters to Us
features.description: Our founding philosophy is simple: every concern you raise gets our full attention. No issue is too small and no question goes unanswered.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Select the service plan that fits your pool and lifestyle. Adjust or cancel anytime without penalties or awkward conversations.

guarantee.headline: Our "Swim-Ready" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool is not perfectly clean and chemically balanced after any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no charge. We have upheld this promise for over 30 years because your trust is the foundation of our business. That is the Putnam difference.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are added to our schedule within 3-5 business days. For emergencies like equipment failures or sudden algae blooms, we prioritize same-week response. Call us at (203) 348-0512 and we will find the fastest path to getting your pool back on track.

faqs.question: Do you service both Connecticut and New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are fully licensed in both states. Our service area covers Lower Fairfield County, CT and Westchester County, NY, including Greenwich, Stamford, Darien, New Canaan, Cos Cob, Rye, and surrounding communities.

faqs.question: What licenses and certifications do you hold?
faqs.answer: We carry Connecticut Home Improvement, Connecticut Plumbing, Connecticut Swimming Pool Builder, and Westchester Home Improvement licenses. Our technicians are certified through the National Swimming Pool Foundation and Association of Pool & Spa Professionals.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service visits?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients provide gate or yard access and our technicians handle everything while you are at work or away. You will always know what was done because we leave a detailed service report after every visit.

faqs.question: Can you handle pool renovations and major repairs?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Beyond weekly maintenance, we perform full renovations including replastering, retiling, coping replacement, liner installation, and equipment overhauls. Our CT Pool Builder license covers the complete scope of structural and cosmetic pool work.

testimonials.name: Catherine W.
testimonials.text: Putnam has maintained our pool in Greenwich for five years running. They are punctual, thorough, and genuinely care about the details. Our water has never been clearer and we never worry about a thing.

testimonials.name: David M.
testimonials.text: We needed a complete replaster and new coping on a 40-year-old pool. The Putnam team managed the project flawlessly from start to finish. It looks brand new and the workmanship has held up beautifully through two winters.

testimonials.name: Sarah & Jonathan K.
testimonials.text: We bought a home with a neglected pool that needed draining, power washing, and repairs. Putnam was incredibly responsive, walked us through every step, and had it swim-ready in under a week. Could not recommend them more highly.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Takes Care of Itself?
contact.subtitle: Request your free, no-pressure pool evaluation today. No contracts required — just honest, certified service from a team that has earned the trust of Fairfield and Westchester families for over 30 years.

footer.description: Professionally licensed pool service proudly serving Lower Fairfield County and Westchester County since 1992.
